definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="entity_add_potion"><field name="potion">REGENERATION</field><value name="level"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">2</field></block></value><value name="duration"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1000</field></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="repeat_with_tick_wait"><value name="times"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">500</field></block></value><value name="_placeholder"><block type="timed_loop_iterator"></block></value><value name="tickwait"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><statement name="foreach"><block type="entity_setinweb"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="entity_set_oxygen"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="air"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value><next><block type="entity_set_ticks_frozen"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="ticksfrozen"><block type="timed_loop_iterator"></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
